preamble:
Introduction The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) service_summary: Cegeka provides <klant> with an Office 365 Back-up solution. The Cegeka Shared Backup is powered by Commvault. It includes data back-up of: Outlook 365, OneDrive for Business, SharePoint online and Microsoft Teams.  By implementing Cegeka Shared Backup:
standard service components:
Cegeka shall be responsible in providing backup service for the following Office 365 Services:
* Fair use policy – see service description
** Fair use policy – see service description. Deleted files kept indefinitely
*** In-place restores into Teams is not possible. (Microsoft limitation)
eligibility and prerequisites:
Conditions Out of scope Responsibility matrix | Activity | Customer | Cegeka | | Define backup scope | R, A | C, I | | Define requirements regarding backup policy and scope | IC | R, A | | Configure backup | I | R, A | | Provide access to self-service | I | R, A | | Integration between launcher and Intranet | C,I | R,A | | Manage and monitor backup | I | R,A |
Activity Customer Cegeka Define backup scope R, A C, I Define requirements regarding backup policy and scope IC R, A Configure backup I R, A Provide access to self-service I R, A Integration between launcher and Intranet C,I R,A Manage and monitor backup I R,A Cross-functional services In order to guarantee the Service quality as specified in Cegeka provides the required Cross-Functional Services as specified in “Cross-Functional-Services.doc”
